src: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
ja: プリインストール済みアプリの削除・テレメトリの無効化をはじめ、Windows 環境をすっきりカスタマイズするシンプルで軽量な PowerShell スクリプト。Windows 10 と Windows 11 の両方に対応
